# UC-18.1.20 · Contract Violation and Implicit Deny Bursts

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Security, Operations &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We surface spikes when the fabric drops east-west chats because contracts went missing or filters slipped out of line, so teams mend policy before users only see mysterious timeouts.*

---

## Description

Detects bursts of Cisco ACI implicit deny traffic and contract-violation signals by comparing five-minute rollups of actrlRule/actrlEntry-backed events on `cisco:aci:actrl` against per-tenant medians, then proving feed health with `cisco:aci:contract`, `cisco:aci:fault`, `cisco:aci:syslog`, and `cisco:aci:audit` joins so operators can separate programming lag, mis-bound EPG pairs, and policy gaps before applications fail silently.

## Value

Fabric teams stop losing hours to timeouts that were really default-drop behavior; finance and trading tenants see faster recovery because implicit spikes attach to change records, fault codes, and MO paths that leadership can audit. Adaptive ratios keep quiet tenants from paging while prod still bleeps reliably, and optional VMware or NSX context explains bursts that start outside the cloth.

## Implementation

Land Splunkbase 4022 syslog plus 1546 pulls for /api/class/actrlRule.json (optional per-node sys/actrl.json), map cisco:aci:contract MO exports, normalize FIELDALIAS for faultInst and aaaModLR, schedule aci_uc18120_implicit_burst_core every 5m with per-tenant throttle, and maintain aci_chg_calendar.csv suppressions.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Cisco APIC clusters must expose HTTPS 443/tcp to collectors while granting read-only RBAC for **actrlRule**, **actrlEntry**, **vzRsSubjFiltAtt**, **vzBrCP**, **faultInst**, and **aaaModLR** without admin write paths.
- Install Splunk_TA_cisco-aci ([Splunkbase **4022**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4022)) on syslog receivers so **cisco:aci:syslog** and **cisco:aci:audit** stay on separate props lanes—parser rollbacks remain surgical when Cisco ships field renames.
- Deploy Splunk REST API Modular Input ([Splunkbase **1546**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1546)) with POST /api/aaaLogin.json plus rotating POST /api/aaaRefresh.json sessions, then schedule GET /api/class/actrlRule.json?rsp-subtree=no on 120–300s cadence and iterate GET /api/node/mo/topology/pod-{podId}/node-{nodeId}/sys/actrl.json when leaf-local implicit enforcement must be proven during **F1394** or **F2301** triage.
- Ingest vzRsSubjFiltAtt and vzBrCP snapshots into **cisco:aci:contract** (often 300–900s) strictly for subject-to-filter truth—never substitute those JSON dumps for hardware counters when judging live drops.
- Optional hybrid site context: Splunk_TA_vmware-nsxt ([Splunkbase **4856**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4856)) and Splunk_TA_vmware ([Splunkbase **1810**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1810)) correlate tenant motion with NSX DFW or vMotion calendars so burst stories include hypervisor change windows without blaming ACI alone.
- Baseline index sizing: actrl MO pulls may emit 50k–250k events daily in 600 EPG fabrics during contract churn—keep **cisco_aci** on warm tiers with 15–30 day hot retention for replay.

Telemetry discipline — Keep **actrlRule** polls on rsp-subtree=no for steady sampling; reserve full subtree walks for bridge calls after you already isolated a **tenant**. **actrlEntry** children are the source of truth for permit vs deny vs implicit catch-alls on leaf ASICs, so implicit spikes usually mean no contract currently grants the communicating **pcTags**. Pair **vzRsSubjFiltAtt** contract JSON with burst minutes to prove filters still attach to **vzSubj** rows when logs disagree. **vzAny** subjects widen implicit visibility; this UC tracks MO-density bursts, not the long permit/deny ratio work in **UC-18.1.9**. Optional per-node GET .../sys/actrl.json under topology/pod/node validates per-leaf programming when the cluster view looks quiet yet one rack overloads counters. Fresh faultInst and aaaModLR lanes keep the join health flags meaningful during incidents. Vocabulary anchors — **implicitRule** traffic differs from **taboo** deny filters; **fvRsCons** and **fvRsProv** asymmetry often explains bursts; **F1394**/**F2301** programming faults align with rising implicit_slices; **ISSU** and **NDO** publish windows legitimately smear buckets; **Heavy Forwarder** saturation delays join subsearches—watch **execution_cost** in scheduler.

Step 1 Configure data collection
- REST stanza A polls https://<apic>/api/class/actrlRule.json with rsp-subtree=no to capture compiled rule DN paths embedding tn-{tenant}, brc-{contract}, subj-{subject}, and flt-{filter} segments plus **actrlEntry** children that encode permit or deny versus implicit catch-alls.
- REST stanza B optionally targets https://<apic>/api/node/mo/topology/pod-1/node-{id}/sys/actrl.json (iterate leaf node ids from **topSystem** or **fabricNode**) when per-switch programming lag must be contrasted with APIC intent snapshots.
- REST stanza C lands vzRsSubjFiltAtt MO alongside **vzBrCP** JSON in **cisco:aci:contract** so Splunk proves whether a subject still carries expected **vzFilter** chains when implicit spikes appear.
- Enable APIC remote syslog for mnemonics that mention implicit decisions, contract denials, or actrl enforcement; normalize to **cisco:aci:syslog** with LINE_BREAKER tuned for multi-line fault descriptions.
- Stream **faultInst** rows to **cisco:aci:fault** with FIELDALIAS symmetry on lc, severity, code, and dn so correlation to burst minutes avoids GUI copy/paste.
- Document collector hostnames beside APIC VIP CMDB rows—mismatched DNS makes join lanes read zero while the fabric stays healthy.

Step 2 Create the search
Paste the spl field into Search; save as aci_uc18120_implicit_burst_core after renaming index=cisco_aci if governance uses dc_network.

```spl
index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:actrl" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
| eval dn_raw=lower(trim(coalesce(dn,distinguishedName,mo_dn,"")))
| rex field=dn_raw "(?i)tn-(?<tenant>[^/]+)"
| eval tenant=coalesce(tenant,lower(trim(coalesce(tnName,tenantName,"unknown_tn"))))
| eval act_entry=upper(trim(coalesce(actEntry,action,ruleAction,rule_action,fltAct,"")))
| eval implicit_flag=case(match(dn_raw,"implicitrule|implicit_den|any_any"),1,act_entry IN ("IMPLICIT_DENY","IMPLICIT","IMPDENY"),1,match(dn_raw,"actrlentry") AND act_entry IN ("DENY") AND NOT match(dn_raw,"vzfilter|vzentry"),1,true(),0)
| eval violation_hint=case(match(dn_raw,"vzrspktfiltatt|vzrssubjfiltatt|actrlrule"),1,match(act_entry,"REJECT|DROP") AND match(dn_raw,"cons|prov|brc-"),1,true(),0)
| bin _time span=5m
| stats count as actrl_events sum(implicit_flag) as implicit_slices sum(violation_hint) as viol_slices dc(dn_raw) as distinct_mo by _time tenant
| eventstats median(implicit_slices) as med_i median(viol_slices) as med_v by tenant
| eval baseline=med_i+med_v+1
| eval burst_raw=implicit_slices+(2*viol_slices)
| eval ratio_i=if(med_i>0,implicit_slices/med_i,null())
| eval ratio_v=if(med_v>0,viol_slices/med_v,null())
| where (implicit_slices>=25 AND ratio_i>=8) OR (viol_slices>=15 AND ratio_v>=8) OR burst_raw>=max(75,8*baseline)
| sort - burst_raw
| eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:contract" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | rex field=_raw max_match=0 "(?i)tn-(?<tenant_hit>[^/\"]+)"
    | stats dc(tenant_hit) as contract_tenants_scanned
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval contract_lane_ok=1
  ]
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | eval lc=lower(trim(coalesce(lc,lifecycleState,lifecycle,"")))
    | eval sev=lower(trim(coalesce(severity,fault_severity,"")))
    | eval is_open=if(sev="cleared" OR lc IN ("cleared","resolved"),0,1)
    | where is_open=1 AND match(sev,"^(major|critical|warning)$")
    | stats count as open_aci_faults dc(sev) as sev_spread
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval fault_lane_ok=1
  ]
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:syslog" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | eval implicit_txt=lower(_raw)
    | where match(implicit_txt,"implicit|denied by policy|contract|actrl")
    | stats count as syslog_implicitish_lines
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval syslog_lane_ok=1
  ]
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:audit" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | eval mod=lower(trim(coalesce(ind,changingObj,aaamodlr_obj,"")))
    | where match(mod,"vzbrcp|vzsubj|vzfilter|fvrscons|fvrsprov|l3extinst")
    | stats count as audit_policy_ops dc(mod) as touched_mos
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval audit_lane_ok=1
  ]
| table _time tenant burst_raw implicit_slices viol_slices med_i med_v distinct_mo contract_lane_ok fault_lane_ok syslog_lane_ok audit_lane_ok open_aci_faults syslog_implicitish_lines audit_policy_ops contract_tenants_scanned sev_spread touched_mos
```

#### Understanding this SPL
- Scope — **cisco:aci:actrl** anchors the math on compiled access-list policy MOs that mirror APIC actrlRule truth instead of guessing from syslog prose alone.
- Tenant extract — rex on dn_raw lifts tn-{tenant} tokens consistent with Visore navigation; tnName overrides cover JSON feeds that already expose tenant fields.
- implicit_flag — Flags MO paths referencing implicitRule idioms or deny actrlEntry rows lacking explicit vzFilter segments—the fabric default-drop posture when no contract grants a path between pcTags.
- violation_hint — Highlights vzRsSubjFiltAtt and contract DNs signaling subject or filter misalignment or actrlRule rows tied to consumer or provider scaffolding that precede visible deny storms.
- Time bucketing — span=5m balances REST latency with enough samples per tenant; lengthen to 10m on small fabrics to dampen median noise.
- eventstats — Per-tenant medians med_i and med_v create adaptive floors so lab tenants do not page on five events while prod tolerates hundreds.
- Thresholds — ratio_i>=8 captures implicit bursts; viol_slices gates catch attachment regressions; burst_raw rescues tenants with near-zero medians.
- Join lanes — contract_lane_ok, fault_lane_ok, syslog_lane_ok, audit_lane_ok prove the five sourcetypes produced bytes in-window—zeroes mean blind analytics, not a calm cloth.
- Outputs — distinct_mo shows how many unique MO paths contributed; pair with Visore CSV exports during bridge calls.

Step 3 Validate
- Compare **implicit_slices** peaks to **Visore** queries on **actrlRule** filtered to implicit motifs for the same tenant and timestamp—accept ±1 bucket skew when REST lags syslog one poll.
- Spot-check three random **dn_raw** values per incident: confirm they resolve to leaf programming rows you expect, not stale cache artifacts after **ISSU**.
- Run **metadata** type=sources on **cisco_aci** for the day—verify **cisco:aci:actrl**, **cisco:aci:contract**, **cisco:aci:fault**, **cisco:aci:syslog**, **cisco:aci:audit** all show recentTime unless strategically disabled.
- Cross-read **open_aci_faults** with APIC Faults UI focusing on **F1394**, **F0467**, **F2301**, **F0952** families tied to policy programming stress.
- During changes, capture expected deny bump notes in **aci_chg_calendar.csv** so reviewers know the burst was authorized, not escalated.

Step 4 Operationalize
- Publish a **dashboard** with role-based read for **NOC** and write for automation owners; embed drilldown tokens **tenant**, **_time**, **distinct_mo** linking to saved **Visore** deep links stored in runbooks.
- Schedule **aci_uc18120_implicit_burst_core** every 5m with summary indexing via **collect** or metric pipeline if executives need 30d trend preservation.
- Wire lookup **aci_chg_calendar.csv** on _time to auto-tag maintenance, **NDO** publish windows, and **LLPG** rebuilds—those labels suppress noisy pages without hiding novel probes.
- Export weekly CSV snapshots (tenant, **burst_raw**, **implicit_slices**) to problem management so contract hygiene backlog stays visible.
- Mirror alerts into **ITSM** tickets with deeplinks to **cisco:aci:audit** editors following **UC-18.1.5** change forensics patterns.

Step 5 Operationalize & Troubleshoot
Visualization — Top row: single-value tiles for **burst_raw** (last bucket) and distinct tenant count with sparkline timechart span=15m on **implicit_slices**. Middle: column chart stacking **implicit_slices** vs **viol_slices** per tenant with reference lines for yesterday p95. Bottom: table sorted on **burst_raw** showing **med_i**, **ratio_i**, **open_aci_faults**, **audit_policy_ops**, **syslog_implicitish_lines**, and lane OK flags colorized red when zero. Provide drilldown subsearches aligned with **Network_Traffic** summaries if you accelerate related datamodels.

Alert design — Trigger when **ratio_i**>=8 AND **implicit_slices**>=25 for two consecutive 5m buckets OR **burst_raw**>=max(75,8*baseline) once with **fault_lane_ok**=1. Throttle 30m per tenant. Include top three **dn_raw** samples, **sev_spread**, **touched_mos**, and links to **NDO** or change tickets. Recovery alert when **implicit_slices** falls below 1.5 times **med_i** for six buckets to auto-resolve **PagerDuty**.

Failure modes — Null tenant **rex** implies blank **dn_raw**—fix **TA** LINE_BREAKER. Join zeros with flowing **actrl** imply **index** ACL or sourcetype typos. **HTTP** **401**/**503** pair with **aaa** refresh or **APIC** leader moves—use **7777** health panels for **quorum** context.

Starter dashboards from Splunkbase **7777** stay useful only after macros match this index layout—misaligned macros create false emptiness, not false positives.

## SPL

```spl
index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:actrl" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
| eval dn_raw=lower(trim(coalesce(dn,distinguishedName,mo_dn,"")))
| rex field=dn_raw "(?i)tn-(?<tenant>[^/]+)"
| eval tenant=coalesce(tenant,lower(trim(coalesce(tnName,tenantName,"unknown_tn"))))
| eval act_entry=upper(trim(coalesce(actEntry,action,ruleAction,rule_action,fltAct,"")))
| eval implicit_flag=case(match(dn_raw,"implicitrule|implicit_den|any_any"),1,act_entry IN ("IMPLICIT_DENY","IMPLICIT","IMPDENY"),1,match(dn_raw,"actrlentry") AND act_entry IN ("DENY") AND NOT match(dn_raw,"vzfilter|vzentry"),1,true(),0)
| eval violation_hint=case(match(dn_raw,"vzrspktfiltatt|vzrssubjfiltatt|actrlrule"),1,match(act_entry,"REJECT|DROP") AND match(dn_raw,"cons|prov|brc-"),1,true(),0)
| bin _time span=5m
| stats count as actrl_events sum(implicit_flag) as implicit_slices sum(violation_hint) as viol_slices dc(dn_raw) as distinct_mo by _time tenant
| eventstats median(implicit_slices) as med_i median(viol_slices) as med_v by tenant
| eval baseline=med_i+med_v+1
| eval burst_raw=implicit_slices+(2*viol_slices)
| eval ratio_i=if(med_i>0,implicit_slices/med_i,null())
| eval ratio_v=if(med_v>0,viol_slices/med_v,null())
| where (implicit_slices>=25 AND ratio_i>=8) OR (viol_slices>=15 AND ratio_v>=8) OR burst_raw>=max(75,8*baseline)
| sort - burst_raw
| eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:contract" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | rex field=_raw max_match=0 "(?i)tn-(?<tenant_hit>[^/\"]+)"
    | stats dc(tenant_hit) as contract_tenants_scanned
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval contract_lane_ok=1
  ]
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | eval lc=lower(trim(coalesce(lc,lifecycleState,lifecycle,"")))
    | eval sev=lower(trim(coalesce(severity,fault_severity,"")))
    | eval is_open=if(sev="cleared" OR lc IN ("cleared","resolved"),0,1)
    | where is_open=1 AND match(sev,"^(major|critical|warning)$")
    | stats count as open_aci_faults dc(sev) as sev_spread
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval fault_lane_ok=1
  ]
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:syslog" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | eval implicit_txt=lower(_raw)
    | where match(implicit_txt,"implicit|denied by policy|contract|actrl")
    | stats count as syslog_implicitish_lines
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval syslog_lane_ok=1
  ]
| join max=1 type=left join_key [
    search index=cisco_aci sourcetype="cisco:aci:audit" earliest=-6h@m latest=now
    | eval mod=lower(trim(coalesce(ind,changingObj,aaamodlr_obj,"")))
    | where match(mod,"vzbrcp|vzsubj|vzfilter|fvrscons|fvrsprov|l3extinst")
    | stats count as audit_policy_ops dc(mod) as touched_mos
    | eval join_key="aci_actrl_burst_v1"
    | eval audit_lane_ok=1
  ]
| table _time tenant burst_raw implicit_slices viol_slices med_i med_v distinct_mo contract_lane_ok fault_lane_ok syslog_lane_ok audit_lane_ok open_aci_faults syslog_implicitish_lines audit_policy_ops contract_tenants_scanned sev_spread touched_mos
```

## Visualization

Single-value tiles for burst_raw and impacted tenant counts; column chart of implicit_slices versus viol_slices by tenant with p95 reference lines; sortable table with med_i, ratio_i, lane-OK lamps, and drilldown-ready dn_raw samples; optional sparkline on syslog_implicitish_lines.

## Known False Positives

**apic_stats_poll_jitter** — When REST collectors align with APIC revision timestamps, two adjacent polls can duplicate the same actrlRule MO while counters barely moved. Dedup on _time, dn_raw, and a hashed _raw fingerprint, or widen span=10m on busy fabrics until HTTP 429 storms settle without hiding real bursts.

**contract_export_duplicate_dn** — Dual modular inputs hitting /api/class/actrlRule.json into one index with different host headers inflate implicit_slices without new leaf drops. Require unique inputs.conf stanza names, stamp collector_id, and dedup dn_raw per bucket so burst math tracks hardware truth.

**implicit_default_aclr_ramp** — Fresh EPG bindings or vzAny toggles legitimately raise implicit deny visibility while permit actrlEntry rows compile. Pair spikes with cisco:aci:audit aaaModLR bursts and change tickets before paging the NOC during labeled maintenance.

**syslog_regex_overmatch** — cisco:aci:syslog lines mentioning contract vocabulary during unrelated routing advisories can lift syslog_implicitish_lines while cisco:aci:actrl stays calm. Demand ratio_i and burst_raw corroboration from structured MO feeds before treating text as enforcement failure.

**faultinst_delegate_double_count** — Parent faultInst rows stacked with children for the same EPG pair may duplicate open_aci_faults unless delegated filtering matches your fault standard operating procedure. Keep cleared lifecycle parity across REST and syslog transports.

**l3out_contract_rebalance** — Border-leaf contract redeployments during L3Out migrations concentrate deny counters on specific pods. Validate per-node /api/node/mo/topology/pod-{podId}/node-{nodeId}/sys/actrl.json samples before assuming east-west leakage.

**aaa_field_alias_drift** — Splunk_TA_cisco-aci upgrades sometimes rename aaaModLR fields (ind versus dn) so audit_policy_ops reads zero despite live edits. Maintain FIELDALIAS stanzas until release notes confirm parser stability.

**ndi_template_replay_noise** — Replayed template publishes from Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator can briefly inflate audit_policy_ops and contract snapshots without equivalent actrl churn; require sustained implicit_slices across three buckets before executive escalation.
